commonAnnotations.summary: Read replica reporting-prod-replica-1 is returning stale data. ReplicaLag CloudWatch metric is not publishing (replica was recently provisioned). Alert triggered by application-level staleness check.
commonAnnotations.error: Replica lag metric unavailable. Staleness detected by read-after-write consistency checks failing in application.
commonAnnotations.suspected_symptom: Reporting dashboards show data 30+ minutes stale. ReplicaLag CloudWatch metric not available for this replica.
